ObjectStates.Name: CardCustom
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
userColorList = {}
userColorList[1] = 'White'
userColorList[2] = 'Brown'
userColorList[3] = 'Red'
userColorList[4] = 'Orange'
userColorList[5] = 'Yellow'
userColorList[6] = 'Green'
userColorList[7] = 'Teal'
userColorList[8] = 'Blue'
userColorList[9] = 'Purple'
userColorList[10] = 'Pink'
userColorList[11] = 'Grey'

ownedBy = nil
faceImageUrl = nil
scriptorObj = nil
cardFaceList = {}

function onLoad()
    if self.getName() == 'ChesterCardScriptor' then
        spreadScript()
    elseif self.getName() == 'card' then
        local tobj = self.getCustomObject()
        faceImageUrl = tobj.face
        scriptorObj = getObjectFromGUID('_GUID_')
        
        ownedBy = getThisCardOwner()

        Wait.frames(function ()
            if ownedBy == nil then
                self.setHiddenFrom(userColorList)
                self.use_hands = false
            else
                self.setHiddenFrom({})
                self.use_hands = true
            end
        end, 30)
    end
end

function setCardOwner(params)
    if params == nil then
        return nil
    elseif params.imageUrl == nil or params.color == nil then
        return nil
    end
    cardFaceList[params.imageUrl] = params.color
end

function getCardOwner(imageUrl)
    if imageUrl == nil then
        return nil
    elseif cardFaceList[imageUrl] == nil then
        return nil
    else
        return cardFaceList[imageUrl]
    end
end

function setThisCardOwner(inputColor)
    if scriptorObj ~= nil then
        scriptorObj.call('setCardOwner', {imageUrl = faceImageUrl, color = inputColor})
    end
end

function getThisCardOwner()
    if scriptorObj ~= nil then
        return scriptorObj.call('getCardOwner', faceImageUrl)
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(collision)
    local tmpobj
    local tcolor = nil
    if self.getName() == 'card' then
        if ownedBy == nil then
            tmpobj = collision.collision_object
            if math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) > 1 or math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) > 1 then
                return
            end
            if string.find(tmpobj.getName(), '토큰') then
                for i = 1, 10 do
                    if string.find(tmpobj.getName(), userColorList[i]) then
                        tcolor = userColorList[i]
                    end
                end
                if tcolor == nil then
                    tcolor = tmpobj.getDescription()
                end
                if tcolor == nil then
                    return
                elseif tcolor ~= userColorList[1] and tcolor ~= userColorList[2] and tcolor ~= userColorList[3] and tcolor ~= userColorList[4] and 
                tcolor ~= userColorList[5] and tcolor ~= userColorList[6] and tcolor ~= userColorList[7] and tcolor ~= userColorList[8] and 
                tcolor ~= userColorList[9] and tcolor ~= userColorList[10] then
                    return
                end
                
                ownedBy = tcolor
                setThisCardOwner(tcolor)

                tmpobj.destroyObject()
                self.setHiddenFrom({})
                self.use_hands = true
                Wait.frames(function()
                    self.deal(1, ownedBy, 1)
                end, 20)
            else
                return
            end
        else
            return
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function spreadScript()
    if self.getName() == 'ChesterCardScriptor' then
        local scriptStr = string.gsub(self.getLuaScript(), '_GUID_', self.guid)
        local tmpObj = getObjects()
        for _, obj in ipairs(tmpObj) do
            if obj.getName() == 'card' then
                obj.setLuaScript(scriptStr)            
            end
        end
    else
        return
    end
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    if flip ~= old_flip and player_color == 'Black' then
        if flip < old_flip then
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            ownedBy = 'Black'
            setThisCardOwner('Black')
        end
    end
end
